programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol® is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100% pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness—benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages. NatureFarm's碧容健®，源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物，是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品。经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证，全面帮助抵御氧化压力，守护大脑、眼睛、心脏、关节、肌肤及血糖健康，适合各年龄层日常保健

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Revival Shampoo
programme.desc: A breakthrough 4-in-1 formula that colors, nourishes, volumizes, and strengthens hair—while improving scalp health in just 5 days. Powered by Korean patented polyphenol technology, it offers safe, natural grey coverage without harsh chemicals, leaving hair darker, fuller, and healthier with every wash. Ellixi发量黑洗发水，采用颠覆性的4合1配方：洗头同时染发、护发、增发量并强韧发丝，仅需5天即可改善头皮与发质。采用韩国专利多酚技术，无需染发剂或化学添加，温和自然遮盖白发。结合多酚氧化着色原理与草本养护成分，让秀发一洗更黑、更丰盈、更健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - [24 Bottles] Kinohimitsu Bird's Nest Red Dates & Wolfberry + Bird's Nest Chinese Ginseng
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu Bird’s Nest is hand-picked and traditionally brewed to enhance beauty, boost vitality, and restore energy. The Ginseng Bird’s Nest relieves fatigue, while the Red Date & Goji Berry version promotes a radiant complexion Kinohimitsu燕窝采用纯手工挑毛与古法炖煮，营养丰富，助美容养颜、增强体质、恢复活力。长白山人参燕窝饮补气强身、缓解疲劳；红枣枸杞燕窝饮促进气血循环，令肌肤红润透亮.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Food Steamer
programme.desc: Simplify meal prep with the 2-Tier Stainless Steel Electric Multi Food Steamer. Designed for healthy, fast, and versatile cooking, it allows you to steam veggies, fish, and more simultaneously, preserving nutrients and flavor. Compact and easy to use—perfect for a nutritious lifestyle! 使用双层不锈钢电动多功能蒸锅，轻松做出健康美味的菜肴。专为健康、快捷、灵活的烹饪设计，能同时蒸煮蔬菜、鱼类等食材，最大限度保留营养与原味。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Dontz Mini Massage Gun
programme.desc: Say goodbye to muscle tension, fatigue, and soreness – this mini powerhouse delivers a therapeutic experience with targeted relief. 迷你筋膜枪小巧精悍，捶打式冲击力十足直达肌肉深层！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker

Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you’re simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables! 这款La Gourmet 火焰电饭锅将火锅和烧烤炉结合一体。为您提供两全其美的享受。无论您是煮汤还是烧烤肉类和蔬菜，都能享受多功能的膳食准备！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Electronic Nerve Stimulator
programme.desc: Compact & intuitive design massager that allows you to treat specific pain areas wherever you are. 微电流电疗结合热敷功能，帮助舒缓疼痛的好帮手，哪里痛就贴哪里！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kplass Cough and Flu Relief Patch
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family. 无需药物的贴布，结合远红外线和穴位疗法，自然缓解感冒症状。感冒缓解贴舒缓鼻塞、流鼻涕、鼻窦压力和寒冷不适。止咳贴有成人装和儿童装，帮助缓解咳嗽、喉咙不适，同时促进血液循环，让呼吸更顺畅、睡眠更安心。温和贴肤，每天可用，长达6小时舒适守护，全家都适用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Fissler Cookware Set
programme.desc: Elevate your kitchen with Germany-made Fissler Stardust Forte! Sleek and durable, its 10-layer titanium Protectal® non-stick coating keeps even heavily seasoned dishes from sticking or burning. Ergonomic handles offer a comfortable, secure grip, while no-drip rims prevent spills. The CookStar® base works on all stoves—including induction—for even, effortless cooking. Easy to clean, built to last, and stylish, it makes every meal a delight and is the perfect choice for a modern, premium kitchen. 升级厨房体验，选择德国制造的 Fissler Stardust Forte！时尚耐用，10层钛强化 Protectal® 不粘涂层，即使烹饪重口味菜肴也不粘、不焦。人体工学手柄握感舒适稳固，防滴漏锅边避免溢出，CookStar®锅底适用所有炉具（含电磁炉），加热均匀、省心省力。易清洁、耐用又有型，让每一餐都成为享受，是现代高端厨房的理想之选。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Krill Oil 180s
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2™ krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Yi Shi Yuan Tiger Milk Lung Cleanse
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. It contains Tiger Milk Mushroom, Cordyceps, and Dendrobium Orchid, the exclusive formula helps maintain your lung's health, suitable for people with coughs, nasal allergies, recurrent colds. 忆思源虎乳芝净肺宝 由忆思源医药顾问团队专为维护呼吸系统健康、增强免疫力与日常保养而调配的独家配方。采用虎乳芝、冬虫夏草、石斛，三种珍贵药材；帮您先调理、后保健，有助于补肺气、维持肺部健康。适合咳嗽、鼻子过敏、反复感冒、长期曝露在空污环境的朋友服用。

programme.title: River Monsters - Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Could the original River Monster be back from the brink and back in business?

programme.title: River Monsters - Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Jeremy is convinced a river monster is at large after hearing tales of a body-snatching.

programme.title: River Monsters - Atomic Assassin
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade braves the radiation in Chernobyl on the trail of a monster fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to the jungles of South America to track down a dangerous fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy Wade investigates a rare giant fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Freshwater Shark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the myth of the freshwater shark.

programme.title: River Monsters - Phantom Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Australia's Fitzroy River on his toughest quest yet.

programme.title: River Monsters - American Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits tourist hotspots in the USA in search of river monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters - Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: A mysterious sea creature impales victims on the island of Sulawesi in Indonesia.

programme.title: River Monsters - Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: River Monsters - Death Ray
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to Thailand in search of the 700lb giant freshwater stingray.

programme.title: River Monsters - Hidden Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to South Africa, where the biggest bull shark ever recorded was caught.

programme.title: River Monsters - Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic Pacific island, an ancient fishing community is being terrorised.

programme.title: River Monsters - Bone Crusher
programme.desc: In the remote Amazon, Jeremy Wade seeks a predator which cannot be caught with a rod.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mekong Mutilator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to south east Asia's Mekong river in search of a baby-faced killer.

programme.title: River Monsters - Alaska's Cold Water Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates a fatal incident in Alaska - is an unidentified killer at large?

programme.title: River Monsters - Flesh Ripper
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to New Zealand looking for a dangerous creature described 200 years ago.

programme.title: River Monsters - Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: River Monsters - Canadian Horror
programme.desc: The hunt for a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans in Canada's wilderness.

programme.title: River Monsters - Russian Killer
programme.desc: The disappearance of three men in Russia proves to be a baffling case for Jeremy Wade.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Terminator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates three mysterious deaths in the remote western Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters - Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy goes on a dangerous mission where he discovers a deep-sea devil.

programme.title: River Monsters - Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: Two men mysteriously vanish on a remote lake in Malaysia.

programme.title: River Monsters - Deep Sea Demon
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes in search of the truth behind the sea serpent legend.

programme.title: River Monsters - Razorhead
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates reports of a creature terrorizing the Florida Keys.

programme.title: River Monsters - Demon Fish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade journeys up the Congo River in search of the ferocious Goliath Tiger Fish.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo is told to help make peace with Indian Chief Vittoro, whose daughter--Hondo's wife--had been killed by the Cavalry. Once the peace pipe is smoked, Hondo must deal with a renegade Native American who threatens the peace by randomly attacking settlers.

programme.title: Beyond Justice
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. Agent Tom Burton (Rutger Hauer) goes to Morocco with businesswoman Christine Sanders (Carol Alt) to rescue her son, the kidnapped heir to a desert fortune.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. Two brothers, one becomes a famous conductor and pianist in New York, another becomes a racecar driver and bodyguard in Hong Kong. When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.title: Detroit 9000
programme.desc: A pair of Detroit policemen investigates a robbery that occurred at a black congressman’s fundraising banquet.

programme.title: The Dirty Seven
programme.desc: Emanuelle is trapped in the middle of a brutal war, as both sides set out to claim her. Unfortunately for them, Emanuelle is not only beautiful but quite intelligent and uses her charms to seduce the soldiers to gain an advantage.

programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. Two brothers, one becomes a famous conductor and pianist in New York, another becomes a racecar driver and bodyguard in Hong Kong. When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: The Grasshopper
programme.desc: Christine Adams leaves her small town in British Columbia at age 19 to follow her boyfriend to L.A., where he works for a bank. She soon gets bored and moves to Las Vegas and becomes a showgirl, eventually slipping into prostitution.
